name: Mitzi Mayfair
description: American dancer and stage and film actress (1914-1976)
abstract: Mitzi Mayfair (born Juanita Emylyn Pique; June 6, 1914 – May 30, 1976) was an American dancer and stage and film actress.

about_quotes.speaker: Lizzie Miles
about_quotes.evidence: the next picture I worked in was with Hal Leroy and Mitzi Mayfair... I played the I was supposed to play the piano and sing three as a crowd... you did the singing I done the singing while she done the dancing

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: We come in, Harry Leroy and Mitzi Mayfair already did their dance... we were doubling from the Lafayette Theater to the Ziegfeld Theater.
